Sumaṅgalavilāsiniyādīghanikāyaṭṭhakathāy.text: Dī 2. 68 piṭṭhe tasmiṁ sutte aparihāniyabhāvena vuttā atthato samānāyeva.
Khu 7. 139, 278; Khu 8. 175; Khu 9. 376; Khu 10. 16; Dī-Ṭṭha 3. 176; Mūlaṭī 2. 2 piṭṭhesupi passitabbaṁ.
Imameva cāti (?) Ayameva pāḷiyaṁ mūlapāṭho viya dissati.
Imameva cāti (?) Ayameva pāḷiyaṁ mūlapāṭho viya dissati.
Dī 3. 95; Ma 3. 110; Aṁ 1. 29; Abhi 2. 348; Khu 10. 78; Khu 11. 231 piṭṭhesu.

Tipiṭakaantaradhānakathāvaṇṇanā/Pāthikav.text: Ma 1. 227; Ma 2. 295; Vi 3. 12; Abhi 4. 218; Khu 1. 64 piṭṭhesu.

Ma 1. 315; Vi 1. 5 piṭṭhe. 2. Saṁ 1. 131 piṭṭhe. 3. Ma 1. 10; Saṁ 1. 265 piṭṭhe.
